description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named fluent.syntax that runs on push and pull request events for the master branch. Run two jobs: unit and syntax. The unit job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs unit tests. The syntax job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.7, installs flake8, and lints the code.
